email.subject: Groww Review Pulse — 2026-W24
email.text_body:
Hi Team,

Here are the top themes from our Groww user reviews for 2026-W24:

- Investing and Trading (200 reviews)
- App Glitches (120 reviews)
- User Friendly (69 reviews)
- High Brokerage Charges (64 reviews)
- App Issues (54 reviews)

Read full report → https://docs.google.com/document/d/1qGjKV6MGJG7niqbaw1xXMk9KzTU-oGP8yEPzYqQqa-w
email.html_body:
Hi Team,

Here are the top themes from our Groww user reviews for 2026-W24:

  • Investing and Trading (200 reviews)
  • App Glitches (120 reviews)
  • User Friendly (69 reviews)
  • High Brokerage Charges (64 reviews)
  • App Issues (54 reviews)

Read full report →

docs_report:
Groww — Weekly Review Pulse (2026-W24)

Period: 12 weeks ending 2026-W24

1. Investing and Trading (200 reviews, Avg Rating: 4.82)
   Users praise the app for its ease of use and effectiveness in trading and investing, with many appreciating its simple interface and quick support.

   Real User Quotes:
   > "great for trading and investing" (5/5)
   > "Very Good app to learn and Invest" (5/5)
   > "nice app with quick support easy to invest or trade" (4/5)

   Action Ideas:
   - Simplify Investment Process: Investigate ways to further simplify the investment process within the app to enhance user experience.
   - Enhance Support: Consider expanding support options to cater to a wider range of user needs and preferences.

2. App Glitches (120 reviews, Avg Rating: 1.69)
   Users are experiencing various technical issues with the Groww app, including glitches, lags, and execution problems, which are resulting in financial losses and frustration. These issues are particularly problematic for traders who require a reliable and efficient platform.

   Real User Quotes:
   > "So many glitches, execution problem" (1/5)
   > "Multiple Discrepancies, lags while doing Transactions" (1/5)
   > "I faced a serious app glitch while trading, and because of this issue I suffered a significant loss" (1/5)

   Action Ideas:
   - Improve App Stability: Conduct a thorough review of the app's code and infrastructure to identify and fix the root causes of glitches and lags.
   - Enhance Error Handling: Implement more robust error handling mechanisms to prevent financial losses and provide users with timely notifications and support when issues arise.

3. User Friendly (69 reviews, Avg Rating: 4.78)
   The Groww app is praised for its clean, beginner-friendly, and smooth interface, making it easy for users to navigate and invest. The app's transparency with charges and portfolio tracking is also appreciated.

   Real User Quotes:
   > "The interface is clean, beginner-friendly, and very smooth to navigate" (5/5)
   > "The interface is simple, intuitive, and makes it easy for new users to start investing" (5/5)
   > "groww is very good app for trading and it use very easy" (5/5)

   Action Ideas:
   - Simplify Onboarding Process: Continuously gather user feedback to identify areas where the app's interface can be further simplified and improved for a better user experience.
   - Enhance Transparency Features: Invest in developing more features that provide users with clear and concise information about charges and portfolio tracking to increase user trust and satisfaction.

4. High Brokerage Charges (64 reviews, Avg Rating: 1.75)
   Users are unhappy with the high brokerage charges for stock trading, which are affecting their decision to use the app. The charges are considered exorbitant and not transparent, leading to a loss of trust and a negative experience.

   Real User Quotes:
   > "exorbitantly hi brokerage charges for stock trading" (1/5)
   > "the charges are very high rs 5 per trade" (1/5)
   > "very high brokerage charges I lost too much amount through brokerage charges" (1/5)

   Action Ideas:
   - Review Brokerage Charge Structure: Re-evaluate the brokerage charge structure to ensure it is competitive and transparent to users.
   - Improve Transparency and Communication: Enhance communication channels to clearly inform users about brokerage charges and any changes to the charge structure.

5. App Issues (54 reviews, Avg Rating: 2.65)
   Users are experiencing various issues with the app, including glitches, inefficiencies, and difficulties with trades, resulting in financial losses. These problems are leading to a loss of trust and satisfaction among users.

   Real User Quotes:
   > "app bhut hi jada glitch hoti hai" (1/5)
   > "Bhai groww app mera paisa kha rh h" (1/5)
   > "now days in option me trade exit ke time dikkat de raha hai" (3/5)

   Action Ideas:
   - Improve App Stability: Conduct thorough testing and debugging to identify and fix glitches and inefficiencies in the app.
   - Enhance Customer Support: Provide timely and effective support to users experiencing issues with the app, including clear communication and resolution of problems.

---
